case_title: MID-CENTURY INSURANCE COMPANY VS. LEOPOLDO ORTIZ GOMEZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF OCT-14-2015 CONTINUED TO FEB-10-2016 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN DEFAULT JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION OF BETTY C. MACHEN RE: INTEREST IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO C.C.P 585 (TRANSACTION ID # 100010013) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MID-CENTURY INSURANCE COMPANY
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, (TRANSACTION ID # 16160004) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MID-CENTURY INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT GOMEZ, LEOPOLDO ORTIZ
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 100004000) AS TO DEFENDANT GOMEZ, LEOPOLDO ORTIZ
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100010013) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 30, INCLUSIVE
REQUEST FOR COURT JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $310.58 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100010013) AS TO DEFENDANT GOMEZ, LEOPOLDO ORTIZ

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MID-CENTURY INSURANCE COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOMEZ, LEOPOLDO ORTIZ $5,426.01 PRINCIPAL, $310.58 INTEREST, $315.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,051.59, SEE SCANNED DOC
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100014602) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MID-CENTURY INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT GOMEZ, LEOPOLDO ORTIZ

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MID-CENTURY INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT GOMEZ, LEOPOLDO ORTIZ DOES 1 TO 30, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR OCT-14-2015 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-17-2015 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         SEP-21-2015
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100001578) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MID-CENTURY INSURANCE COMPANY SERVED JUL-01-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GOMEZ, LEOPOLDO ORTIZ

DECLARATION OF BETTY C. MACHEN IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT BY COURT PURSUANT TO C.C.P 1033 (TRANSACTION ID # 100010013) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MID-CENTURY INSURANCE COMPANY
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF FEB-10-2016 IS OFF CALENDAR - JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
